{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged crystalline madra
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A long shaft of [[Forged crystalline madra]] the size of a tower sped overhead.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
